victim.value: Sarah, former best friend who died under unclear circumstances
victim.quote: yesterday I got a call from her mom saying that Sarah died

closed_world.value: High school social environment where friendship deteriorated
closed_world.quote: High school was fine for the first two months

investigator.value: Emily, the narrator reflecting on her lost friendship with Sarah
investigator.quote: I made a promise to myself that I would never forgive her

social_world.value: High school social hierarchy with 'popular' girls versus normal groups creating tension and exclusion dynamics
social_world.quote: Sarah said that these girls were the 'popular ones' and these girls said that my group were not the 'nerds ones'

investigator_wound.value: Narrator's guilt over unforgiveness and feeling responsible for friend's death
investigator_wound.quote: I felt so guilty when I saw her. She did not deserve to be in this place, in this situation.
